item.title: Edit: I REFUSE TO SCRUFF MY CATS UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. She will eventually learn to trust me with something like the occasional sink bath if I remain consistent. I’m holding her under her arms, not her neck. I have big hands lol. p.s. I finally caved a
item.description: By @malpluscats: Edit: I REFUSE TO SCRUFF MY CATS UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. She will eventually learn to trust me with something like the occasional sink bath if I remain consistent. I’m holding her under her arms, not her neck. I have big hands lol. p.s. I finally caved a

item.title: ⭐️Pro tip ⭐️: When you gently and thoughtfully introduce kittens to new experiences 😽, the more likely they are to accept them later in life 😺 ~samantha #kittentips #kittenbehavior #catbehavior #kittentraining #cattraining #cattips #SaveThemAll
item.description: By @bestfriendsanimalsociety: ⭐️Pro tip ⭐️: When you gently and thoughtfully introduce kittens to new experiences 😽, the more likely they are to accept them later in life 😺 ~samantha #kittentips #kittenbehavior #catbehavior #kittentraining #cattraining #cattips #SaveThemAll

item.title: 😂 When a new kitten enters a household, the resident cat will almost always establish a social hierarchy through boundary setting behaviors. What looks like bullying is actually normal feline social correction. Older cats teach younger ones the rules by p
item.description: By @pubity: 😂 When a new kitten enters a household, the resident cat will almost always establish a social hierarchy through boundary setting behaviors. What looks like bullying is actually normal feline social correction. Older cats teach younger ones the rules by p
